title: Violations; penalty
doc_html:
§3152. Violations; penalty

            Any violation of this Chapter shall be treated as a deceptive and unfair trade practice and shall subject the violator to any and all penalties provided in the Unfair Trade Practices and Consumer Protection Law, R.S. 51:1401 et seq.

            Acts 2018, No. 571, §1.
doc_text:
§3152.  Violations; penalty
Any violation of this Chapter shall be treated as a deceptive and unfair trade practice
and shall subject the violator to any and all penalties provided in the Unfair Trade Practices
and Consumer Protection Law, R.S. 51:1401 et seq.
Acts 2018, No. 571, §1.
